message:
test(ffs-cli): add CLI binary E2E tests (bd-8bdla)

Add 8 E2E tests for ffs-cli that spawn actual cargo run processes
against real ext4 images created via mkfs.ext4:

- cli_inspect_ext4_returns_json: verify JSON output structure
- cli_inspect_ext4_human_readable: verify human-readable output
- cli_inspect_truncated_image_returns_error: error handling
- cli_inspect_nonexistent_file_returns_error: error handling
- cli_info_ext4_shows_superblock: verify info command output
- cli_fsck_ext4_clean_image: verify fsck on clean image
- cli_fsck_json_output: verify JSON output mode
- cli_repair_verify_only_ext4: verify repair --verify-only

All tests emit SCENARIO_RESULT markers for CI parsing.
No mocks used - real filesystem images via mkfs.ext4/debugfs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
